description: Collapse a single-target variable assignment. Tree-sitter produces ``assignment → (LHS_identifier, RHS)`` for ``scaler = StandardScaler()``; the LHS identifier doesn't survive intact across later uses (each occurrence becomes a fresh node with the same text but no producer edge). This rule wires RHS → LHS so the var-resolution pattern can rewire identifier uses in a follow-up pass, then drops the assignment node so it doesn't re-match.
